chosen: Google Business Profile chat: an unclaimed lead channel with a hidden 24-hour reply rule, plus the welcome-message fix

chosen: Lead Temperature Framework: sort every lead into Hot/Warm/Cold and match response speed to the bucket, not a one-size sequence
